description.value: > Revelation Associated Domain: Sun Replacement Power: The following granted power replaces the sun’s blessing ability of the Sun domain. Guided Eyes (Su): Perception is always a class skill for you. In addition, whenever you make a skill check to see through a disguise or find something that is hidden or concealed, you gain a +4 sacred bonus on the check.
